messages.content: Other ways to say, "Thank you for bringing to our attention that you have observed a violation of a third-party aggregator."

- We appreciate you notifying us of a third-party aggregator breach.
- Thank you for making us aware of a violation by a third-party aggregator.
- Your observation of a breach by a third-party aggregator is valuable and important to us.
- We are grateful for your vigilance in reporting a third-party aggregator's infraction.
- It was helpful that you brought to our attention that a third-party aggregator has committed a violation.
Other ways to say, "Meanwhile, I would also like to ask for your Merchant Center ID and admin email for us to better assist."

- Can you please provide us with your Merchant Center ID and admin email so that we can offer more effective assistance? 
- In order to assist you better, may we have your Merchant Center ID and admin email, please? 
- It would be great if you could share your Merchant Center ID and admin email with us so that we may be able to provide better help. 
- For us to offer more personalized assistance, we kindly request your Merchant Center ID and admin email. 
- Could you kindly give us your Merchant Center ID and admin email to aid us in providing more tailored support?

Please improve this email draft:

Thank you for bringing this to our attention.

We understand that you are concerned about the products in pending initial review. Upon checking, we have confirmed that the initial review didn't proceed because of your shipping settings.

Your shipping settings have indicated that your shipping rate is defined by your carrier. However, the product is too heavy to be delivered by the carrier so the shipping cost is not calculated. Please reach out to your carrier to confirm the minimum weight the carrier can deliver.

Dear [customer name],

Thank you for reaching out to us and bringing this matter to our attention.

We understand your concern regarding the products pending initial review. We have looked into the issue and discovered that the initial review process did not proceed due to the shipping settings you have selected.

We would like to highlight that your shipping settings are determined by your carrier's predefined system. Upon further review, we have found that the product in question has an excessive weight, resulting in the shipping cost not being calculated. May we suggest contacting your carrier to confirm what is the minimum weight needed to be delivered?

Once you have the information, please change your shipping settings accordingly. We guarantee you that setting the correct shipping cost will accelerate the review process and bring your product in front of potential clients sooner.

Thank you for your understanding, and please don't hesitate to reach out to us for further assistance. We are always here to help you.

Sincerely,
[Your name]

Please create an email draft:

Thank you for providing some screenshots.

Please be advised that changes on the account may take 24 ro 48 hours to complete. So, if you make changes recently on your Merchant Center account, it may take a while for the changes to reflect in your Google Ads account.

For us to better assist you, please provide the name of the campaign where you see this information. I look forward to your response.

Dear [Customer’s name],

Thank you for providing us with the screenshots. Your collaboration is much appreciated.

We would like to inform you that any changes made to your Merchant Center account may take up to 24 to 48 hours to reflect in your Google Ads account. Please be patient as the updated information will be reflected shortly.

In order to offer you better assistance, kindly provide us with the name of the campaign where you see this information. This information will help us look into the issue more thoroughly and provide you with an accurate solution.

We understand the importance of this matter and would like to assure you that we are doing everything possible to resolve it quickly. Once again, we appreciate your cooperation.

Please don't hesitate to reach out to us if you need further assistance, and we look forward to hearing back from you soon.

Sincerely,
[Your name]

Please create an email draft:

We appreciate your patience while we look into your account. I understand that you are concerned about the suspension on your Merchant Center account.

We are glad to inform you that the previous violation regarding (AFFILIATE SPAM (ABUSE OF THE NETWORK)) has been resolved. However, the account has been suspended again because it has been detected that the account violates the policies.

Please review the policies to identify and rectify the issues on the account. If you have ensured that the account complies with the policies, you may raise a review at your convenience.

Here is a step-by-step instruction on how to raise a review:

I hope that helps. If you have any questions, please let me know and I'll be glad to help.

Dear [Customer's Name],

We appreciate you being patient while we investigated your Merchant Center account. We understand your concern regarding the suspension, and we're here to help.

Firstly, we are pleased to inform you that the previous violation regarding (AFFILIATE SPAM (ABUSE OF THE NETWORK)) has been resolved. However, it's with regret to inform you that your account has been suspended again. Our system has detected that the account is still violating the policies.

We kindly advise you to review the policies, identify the issues on your account, and rectify them accordingly. Once you have done so, you may raise a review when you are ready. 

To guide you on how to request a review, please follow the steps listed below:

1. Sign in to your Merchant Center account.
2. Locate the “Account issues” section under “Account”.
3. Find the suspension that you would like to appeal and click on “Appeal” next to it.
4. Select “I fixed the violation” and click “Next”.
5. Follow the instructions provided to complete the appeal request process.

I hope the above-mentioned steps are clear, and you can follow them quickly. If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are always here to help.

Best Regards,
[Your Name]

Please create an email draft about the customer's request on product capacity increase and tell the customer that their request has been approved as their original capacity has increased from 150k to 300k for Shopping ads and Free listings.

Dear [Customer's Name],

Thank you for your inquiry regarding your request for an increase in your Google Merchant Center product capacity.

We understand your need for more storage, and we're glad to inform you that your request has been approved. Your original capacity of 150,000 products for Shopping ads and Free listings has been increased to 300,000 products.

You can now add more products to your Google Merchant Center account without having to worry about exceeding the limit. You can also start advertising more of your products to potential customers, which can increase your visibility and hopefully lead to more sales.

If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us, and we'll be happy to help. We value your business and appreciate your trust in us.

Thank you for choosing Google Merchant Center.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
Rephrase: Please be advised that the initial review process may take 3-5 business days to complete.
Kindly take note that the initial review process typically requires 3-5 business days to complete.

Please re-write or improve this email draft:

Thank you for providing us with the screenshots. Your collaboration is much appreciated.

Based on the screenshots that we have received, you are looking at the preview section of the Google Ads account. Please be advised that it only shows what your ads would look like but any changes that you made from the Merchant Center won't reflect on the preview section on your Google Ads account.

You may directly search the product using the title on the Shopping tab to confirm the sale price is showing.

I hope I was able to make you understand this.

Dear [Customer's Name],

We would like to express our gratitude for providing us with the screenshots. Your cooperation is greatly appreciated.

After evaluating the screenshots, we noticed that you are viewing the preview section of your Google Ads account. We would like to bring to your attention that the preview only displays what your ads will look like once they go live. Kindly note that any changes that you make from the Merchant Center won't reflect on the preview section of your Google Ads account.

Instead, we suggest you directly use the search field on the Shopping tab of your Google Merchant Center account to confirm that the sale price of your product is showing as expected.

We hope that with this clarification, we have provided you with a better understanding of the Merchant Center and Google Ads functions. If you have further questions, please don't hesitate to contact us, and we'll be happy to help.

We appreciate your cooperation and look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
Rephrase: We would like to bring to your attention that the preview only displays the layout of your ads
Please be advised that the preview feature solely showcases the format and layout of your ads.

Rephrase this to a customer oriented email: Alright. But regardless if it has fullfilled the requirements, given that the sales badge is automated, there is no guarantee that the sales badge may display all the time since this is automated and we don't have control over it.

Dear [Customer's Name],

Thank you for your message. We would like to inform you that although your product met the necessary requirements for the sales badge, we would like to also point out that the sales badge is an automated feature, and there's no guarantee that it will always be displayed. 

Please understand that this feature works under automated algorithms, which we don't have control over. However, we're here to assist if you have any further concerns or questions regarding this matter.

We hope this information helps you, and we appreciate your patience and understanding. Please don't hesitate to contact us should you require further assistance.

Thank you for using our platform.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

Please rewrite or improve this email draft: 

Thank you for contacting gTech Customer Experience regarding the Merchant Center account. My name is Lester and we appreciate your patience while we review your query. 

I understand you are concerned about the suspension of your account and I'll be happy to assist you.

I understand the urgency of your situation. For us to better assist you, please provide the Merchant Center ID and admin email that needs to be investigated. Providing some screenshots may also help us to further review the account.

I look forward to your response.

Dear [Customer’s name],

Thank you for getting in touch with us regarding your Merchant Center account. My name is Lester and I appreciate your patience while we review your query.

I completely understand that you are concerned about the suspension of your account, and I am more than happy to help you resolve this issue.

We appreciate your collaboration in working with us to investigate your account. To assist you better, please provide us with your Merchant Center ID and admin email, which will help us identify your account details quickly. 

It would also be beneficial if you could send us some screenshots related to the issues you are facing, as this will enable us to gain a clearer understanding of the problem.

Rest assured that we will investigate your account and will do our best to offer the most effective solution in the shortest time possible. 

Thank you for trusting Google Merchant Center, and we look forward to hearing back from you soon.

Warm regards, 
[Lester]
Google Merchant Center Support Team

Please create an email draft about the customer is requesting to have an additional 1 million capacity. Please inform the merchant that we have already submitted a request and the result is disapproved due to 20% of the product that has been submitted were disapproved. Suggest to work on the disapproved products first, and try requesting again once the requirement is fulfilled.

Dear [Customer's Name],

Thank you for your email regarding your request for an additional one million capacity for your Google Merchant Center account.

We understand your need for more capacity, and we have submitted your request for review. However, we regret to inform you that the request has been declined at this time.

Upon reviewing your account, we found that 20% of the products that you previously submitted were disapproved. Unfortunately, according to our policies, in order to request for more capacity, your account must have a good standing, which means that all current products must comply with our policies without any disapprovals.

We suggest that you first work on the disapproved products, ensure they are in compliance with our policies, and then you can request more capacity again once the relevant requirements are fulfilled. 

We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause but be assured that we are always here to assist you in any way we can. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Thank you for using Google Merchant Center.

Sincerely,
[Your name]

Please rephrase: I understand that the 14% that is showing on your Diagnostics page and the 20% must have caused confusion.
I'll be taking the case offline to investigate with our wider team for a possible discrepancy within the system. Kindly allow us 72 hours to work on the case. I'll get back to you once I have an update.

I completely understand that the 14% displayed on your Diagnostics page, along with the 20%, may have caused some difficulty in comprehending the situation. 

I will proceed to investigate the matter further with our wider team to determine if there may be any discrepancies within our system. Please note that this will be done offline, and I request that you kindly allow us a period of 72 hours to complete our assessment. 

Rest assured that I will provide you with an update as soon as I have additional information on the matter.

Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Please improve: Thank you for your reply.

You can only set up tax on account-level if your target country is the United States. Upon checking, I have confirmed that your target country is the United States only.

For instructions on how to set up tax for the United States, please visit this article.

Dear [Customer’s name],

Thank you for your response. 

To further assist you, I would like to share that account-level tax setup is available only if the target country is the United States. Upon checking your account, we have confirmed that your target country is currently set to United States only.

To guide you through the process of setting up tax for the United States, I have attached an article that provides step-by-step assistance for your convenience.

[Article Link]

Kindly feel free to reach out to us if you have any other queries or if you need further assistance in this matter. Thank you for choosing Google Merchant Center.

Sincerely,
[Your name]
Rephrase: I see. Is there any specific time how long we get the results?
I understand your concern. Could you please clarify if you are inquiring about the estimated time frame for receiving the results?

Please re-write this email:

Thank you for your reply.

Tax is only required if your target country is the United States. To guide you through the process of setting up tax for the United States, please visit this article.

If you want to change the target country, however, sign in to your Merchant Center and go to Products > Feeds > Feed name > Settings > Click the pencil icon under 'Target countries' > Select the countries where you want to show the products from this feed > Save.

If your products don't come with tax and your target country isn't the United States, there is no need to set up tax.

Dear [Customer’s name],

We would like to thank you for your response.

Regarding your inquiry about tax setup, kindly note that tax is only required in the United States as per our policies. Therefore, if you are based in the United States and want to set up tax for your products, please follow the instructions provided in this article that explains the process step-by-step.

However, if you want to change or add other target countries, you can follow these steps:

1. Sign in to your Merchant Center account.
2. Go to Products > Feeds.
3. Click on your feed name.
4. Choose Settings, then click the pencil icon under 'Target countries'.
5. Select the countries where you want to show products from this feed.
6. Save your settings.

If your products are sold outside of the United States and don't come with tax, then there is no need to set up tax.

We hope this information is helpful. If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to us as we're always here to help.

Thank you for choosing Google Merchant Center.

Best regards,
[Your name]
